items.subject: Inquiry re: 12-month ADMT loan-denial activity (Ref. CO-AG-2026-0418)
items.preview: Under Colorado SB 26-189 §1706, this office is requesting documentation of all Covered Automated Decisionmaking Tools used in consumer credit underwriting for Colorado residents from April 2025 through April 2026...

items.subject: Underwriting-v4.2 → v4.3 release notes (action required)
items.preview: Heads up: we're shipping a material update to the risk scorer on May 22 that changes how short-tenure employment is weighted. Per §1702(2) we've attached the updated documentation packet...

items.subject: FYI — Blend renewal moves to legal review next week
items.preview: Erin — heads-up that the Blend pre-qualification contract renewal lands on your desk Tuesday. Standard MSA plus the new ADMT addendum we've been negotiating...

items.subject: This week in compliance: CFPB statement, CO rulemaking timeline, two new state bills
items.preview: Colorado AG issues draft 'materially influence' presumptions for public comment; CFPB clarifies adverse-action overlap with new state ADMT regimes...

items.subject: Tomorrow 9:00 AM — Board Risk Committee prep
items.preview: Materials due to BRC by EOD today. Outstanding items: model risk sub-section (you), cyber update (Henry), AG inquiry update (TBD)...

items.from: NYC Department of Consumer & Worker Protection
items.subject: LL 144 Compliance Audit Notice (Ref. NYC-DCWP-2026-0271)
items.preview: Pursuant to NYC Local Law 144 and §20-870 et seq., this office is auditing your use of Automated Employment Decision Tools (AEDTs) for New York City candidates during the prior 12 months...

items.subject: Skills-Match v2.1 → v2.2: changes to tenure-pattern signal
items.preview: We're rolling out an updated tenure-pattern feature in Skills-Match on May 24. Updated model card and limitations document attached for your records...

items.subject: Q2 hiring report — three role groups using new screening tool
items.preview: Erin — sharing Q2 hiring metrics. Three new role groups (Senior Analyst, Risk Engineer, Customer Ops Lead) moved to the iCIMS video assessment last month...

items.subject: IL AI Hiring Act: amendments, AG enforcement signals, and what changed
items.preview: The Illinois AG's office has opened its first ADMT-related investigation into a retailer using AI video assessments; here's what HR teams need to know...

items.subject: Tomorrow 9:00 AM — People Committee prep
items.preview: Outstanding items for tomorrow: hiring KPI dashboard, ATS migration status, AEDT audit response (TBD)...

automotive.inbox_owner_role: Chief Privacy Officer, Pinetop Motors USA

items.subject: Inquiry re: Connected-Vehicle ADMT and Captive-Finance Decisions (Ref. CPPA-AUTO-2026-1107)
items.preview: Under the CCPA and the ADMT regulations adopted by this Agency, we are investigating Pinetop Motors USA's use of automated decisionmaking across the vehicle customer lifecycle — including pre-qualification, captive financing, trade-in valuation, and connected-vehicle services...

items.subject: Pinetop Aria EV — preliminary inquiry on automatic emergency braking
items.preview: ODI has opened a preliminary evaluation of automatic emergency braking on the 2025-2026 Pinetop Aria EV based on consumer complaints; please respond with system logs by EOD Friday...

items.subject: California AG enforcement signal: AI in trade-in valuation
items.preview: Three California dealers received CCPA notice-and-cure letters this week tied to AI-assisted trade-in valuation tools that allegedly under-valued based on telematics signals — what franchise dealers and OEMs need to know...

items.subject: FYI — behavioral-segmentation v3 launching next sprint
items.preview: Erin — the marketing team's behavioral-segmentation model v3 (driving-style cohorts driven by telematics) is launching in next sprint's release. Privacy review tickets are open but flagged 'low priority' — wanted you to see...

items.subject: Tomorrow 9:00 AM — Aria EV launch privacy gate review
items.preview: Final privacy-gate review for Aria EV launch. Outstanding items: driver-monitoring BIPA posture, captive-finance ECOA attestation, telematics secondary-use opt-in flow...
